result.stdout:
Description:
  The EssentialCSharp.ListingManager helps to organize and manage the EssentialCSharp source code

Usage:
  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  update <directoryIn>  Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a chapter
  scan                  Scans for various things

  Scans for mismatched listings

  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager scan listings <directoryIn> [options]

  <directoryIn>  The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

Options:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Scans for mismatched tests

Usage:
  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager scan tests <directoryIn> [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryIn>  The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

Options:
  --all-chapters  The passed in path is the parent directory to many chapter directories rather than a single chapter directory.
  --single-dir    All listings are in a single directory and not separated into chapter and chapter test directories.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Description:

  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager scan tests <directoryIn> [options]

  <directoryIn>  The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

Options:

  --single-dir    All listings are in a single directory and not separated into chapter and chapter test directories.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a chapter

Usage:
  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager update <directoryIn> [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryIn>  The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

Options:
  --verbose       Displays more detailed messages in the log.
  --preview       Displays the changes that will be made without actually making them.
  --by-folder     Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a folder.
  --single-dir    All listings are in a single directory and not separated into chapter and chapter test directories.
  --all-chapters  The passed in path is the parent directory to many chapter directories rather than a single chapter directory.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a chapter

Usage:
  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager update <directoryIn> [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryIn>  The directory of the chapter to update listings on.

Options:
  --verbose       Displays more detailed messages in the log.
  --preview       Displays the changes that will be made without actually making them.
  --by-folder     Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a folder.
  --single-dir    All listings are in a single directory and not separated into chapter and chapter test directories.
  --all-chapters  The passed in path is the parent directory to many chapter directories rather than a single chapter directory.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
